title: Optimization speed under dispatch deadlines
prompt: A dispatch plan must be produced within five minutes. A new algorithm often finds high-quality feasible solutions sooner than a reference method, though the supplied study has not yet established statistical superiority. Frame the operational value of speed while separating hypothesis from evidence.

model_specification.mechanism: Search ordering affects the quality of the incumbent available when the operational deadline stops computation.

prohibited_inferences: The new method is proven faster on all instances

evidence_needs.claim: The algorithm produces better incumbents within five minutes
